title: China and 29 countries launch World AI Cooperation Organization; US, EU, UK, Japan absent
cycle_2026-07-19_night_c1_note: Flagged as strong candidate during discovery/Tier-0 sweep (broad multi-outlet coverage 2026-07-17 through 07-19). dedup-check clean, no match. Queued for cycle 2 -- cycle 1 lacked time to run the full verify+falsify+editor-gate pass.
cycle_2026-07-19_night_c2_note: Re-ran dedup-check (still clean). Fresh verifier sub-agent + independent adversarial falsifier sub-agent both run. Falsifier required the headline avoid implying universal 'global' buy-in (confirmed China-aligned/Global South bloc, US/EU/UK/Japan/South Korea absent) and flagged that WAICO currently has no published charter/secretariat/budget -- both incorporated into the published article. Editor gate passed EN and TR. Published.
